impacts.statement: The bayou is at its highest level recorded.
This level is similiar to that reached during the late december 1982 flood event.
This level is similiar to that reached during tropical storm Allison of 1989.
Major flood damage along the bayou begins at this level. Highway 1211 and many secondary roads are closed.
Water covers highway 1211 upstream of the gage.
Moderate flood damage along the bayou begins at this level.
Hawks Road near the gauge becomes flooded.
Minor flooding of agricultural and forested areas near the bayou will occur.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 48 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
